scripts.android:install: bun --cwd=app run tauri android build --apk --debug && adb install -r app/src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/arm64/debug/app-arm64-debug.apk
scripts.lint: bun run lint-js && bun run lint-text && bun run lint-style && bun run lint-ga && bun run lint-rust && bun run lint-image && bun run lint-security && oxfmt .
scripts.lint-rust: cargo fmt --all && cargo clippy --fix --allow-staged --allow-dirty --all-targets --all-features && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.lint-js: bunx oxlint --fix && bunx eslint --fix . && bunx jscpd . && bunx knip --no-config-hints
